jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at FurnitureMart
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a SEO Specialist in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
